narrative:
Turtlecreek Township has 11,925 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.5 percentage points.
